raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Meeting attendance","name":"I've noticed you've been late to meetings — what's happening there?","description":"Explores the reasons behind her tardiness to meetings.","purpose":"competency","stage":"evidence","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Communication clarity","name":"Where do you feel your communication has been most effective, and where is it falling short?","description":"Identifies strengths and weaknesses in her communication skills.","purpose":"competency","stage":"evidence","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"UX initiative impact","name":"How do you assess the impact of your recent UX initiatives on the product?","description":"Evaluates her perception of the effectiveness of her UX contributions.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap_naming","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Stakeholder relationship","name":"What challenges have you faced in engaging with product and engineering stakeholders?","description":"Explores difficulties in her stakeholder engagement.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap_naming","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Effective delegation","name":"What have you delegated recently, and how did it empower your team?","description":"Examines her delegation practices and their impact on the team.","purpose":"competency","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Time management","name":"How are you managing your priorities to ensure timely attendance at meetings?","description":"Investigates her time management and prioritization skills.","purpose":"competency","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Project prioritization","name":"What are you prioritizing right now, and what are you choosing to deprioritize?","description":"Surfaces her current focus and decision-making in project management.","purpose":"competency","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Commitment to change","name":"What's the first concrete step you'll take to address any gaps we've discussed today?","description":"Drives commitment to action based on the meeting's discussion.","purpose":"competency","stage":"commit","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]}]}
